title: Resolve source-routing rule: SRD6: residual zeta/kappa source exclusion
description: Route: zeta/kappa residuals excluded from ordinary source roles. Allowed condition: residuals are killed, non-metric, diagnostic, compact-neutral, or have vanishing exterior 1/r coefficients. Forbidden condition: zeta/kappa residuals become second scalar metric source. Consequence: residual-kill/non-metric residual remains safest but not a theorem..
